headline: Real Business Impact, Not Just Engagement
description: Shared shopping doesn’t just create a better experience — it delivers measurable results across your core ecommerce KPIs. From larger basket sizes to lower acquisition costs, collaborative shopping changes how customers discover, evaluate, and buy products together.

features.title: Higher Average Order Value
features.description: We measure success by what matters to you. These figures reflect the impact we've delivered for our clients.

features.title: Shared decisions increases confidence
